title: Master Flexbox for Perfect Layouts
Speed Up Your JavaScript with Debouncing
Use Git Branching Like a Pro
full_content:
Working with branches keeps your code clean and organized.

Tips:
• Use feature branches for new features.
• Never work directly on main branch.
• Use descriptive branch names like feature/login-system.

Commands:

git checkout -b feature/login
git add .
git commit -m "Added login feature"
git push origin feature/login

Tip: Makes collaboration easier and avoids breaking production code.

title: Optimize Images for Faster Websites
full_content: Large images slow down your website. Optimize them properly. Tips: • Use WebP format instead of PNG/JPG. • Compress images using tools like TinyPNG. • Use lazy loading. Tip: Faster websites improve SEO and user experience.

title: Use Environment Variables for Security
full_content:
Never hardcode sensitive data like API keys in your code.

Use .env file:

API_KEY=your_secret_key
PORT=5000

Access in Node.js:

require('dotenv').config();
console.log(process.env.API_KEY);

Tip: Keeps your credentials safe and secure.
